Can, Isik (2563) - Gurel, Ediz (2635) 0-1
EICC 2026 (https://lichess.org/broadcast/european-individual-chess-championship-2026--boards-1-66/round-8/ZmRz5V4T/vQrm1SJe) [8.5] B33 2026.04.15
B33 Sicilian, Pelikan (Lasker/Sveshnikov) variation

1.e4 c5 2.Nc3 Nc6 3.Nge2 Nf6 4.d4 cxd4 5.Nxd4 e5 6.Ndb5 d6 7.Nd5 Nxd5 8.exd5 Nb8 9.a4 Be7 10.Be2 O-O 11.O-O Nd7 12.b4 a6 13.Na3 b6 14.Nc4 a5 15.c3 Qc7 16.Be3 Ba6 17.Na3 Bxe2 18.Qxe2 Qxc3 19.Rfc1 Qb3 20.Qb5 Rfd8 21.Rcb1 Qc3 22.Nc4 axb4 23.Nxb6 Nxb6 24.Bxb6 Rdb8 25.a5 Kf8 26.Rc1 Qd2 27.Rab1 g6 28.h3 Kg7 29.Rd1 Qc3 30.Rdc1 Qd2 31.Rc6 b3 32.Rcc1 b2 33.Rd1 Qc2 34.Qd7 Rxb6 35.axb6 Qxd1+ 36.Rxd1 Ra1 37.Qg4 Rc1 38.b7 b1=Q 39.Rxc1 Qxc1+ 40.Kh2 Qb2 41.Qc8 Bg5 42.Kg1 Qa1+ 43.Kh2 Qd4 44.Kg1 Bh4
